history.content: I want you to go ahead and do some research on the web on Openclaw, tell me about it - No need to keep it short, give me a full summary/explanation on your findings. You can either use my browser to automate and search articles, or use the websearch tool, whichever works best to give you the best info
Multiple sources indicate it's part of a growing stack for AI-powered coding tools, though its rapid rise has sparked both excitement and controversy in the tech community.
